calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-12-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order and judgment signed in open court. Judge Harold Kahn; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/HK)
